overture.name: Overture
overture.backend.mpris.description: Uses the D-Bus MPRIS API to fetch currently playing media.
overture.backend.winrt.description: Uses the WinRT API to fetch media.
config.overture.general.tooltip: Settings relating to the functionality of Overture itself
config.overture.general.retrieval.descri: How Overture should get track data
config.overture.general.retrieval.backen: The platform or interface that the currently playing track will be taken from.
config.overture.general.retrieval.interv: How often the currently playing track should be updated
config.overture.general.retrieval.smart_: Only check on the above interval when the window is unfocused, otherwise use the music duration to check after each track is done
config.overture.appearance.tooltip: How the HUD widgets should appear
config.overture.appearance.colors.descri: Which colors the HUD widgets should use
config.overture.appearance.colors.title: Title Text Color
The text color of the track name
config.overture.appearance.colors.artist: The text color of the track's artist
config.overture.appearance.colors.progre: The text color of the elapsed track time (on the left)
config.overture.appearance.colors.durati: The text color of the track duration (on the right)
config.overture.appearance.colors.progre: The color of the unfilled portion of the progress bar
The color of the filled portion of the progress bar
config.overture.appearance.position.desc: Where/how big HUD elements should appear
config.overture.appearance.position.x_an: Where the horizontal position should be based on
config.overture.appearance.position.y_an: Where the vertical position should be based on
config.overture.appearance.position.x_of: How many pixels the HUD should be shifted horizontally
config.overture.appearance.position.y_of: How many pixels the HUD should be shifted vertically
config.overture.appearance.position.widt: The maximum width of the HUD element (0 = auto)
config.overture.appearance.position.scal: Scaling factor for the entire HUD
config.overture.appearance.position.padd: How many pixels should surround each side of the HUD
config.overture.appearance.tweaks.descri: Miscellaneous changes to how the HUD behaves
config.overture.general.tweaks.prefer_al: Prefer the album name to the artist name in the secondary text field
config.overture.general.tweaks.image_on_: Which side the track image should appear on
